title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training program for the DevOps course has demonstrated high effectiveness, with all trainees successfully completing the course and achieving a perfect pass rate. The overall attendance rate is commendable at 96%, indicating strong engagement. The average score of 7.89 out of 10 reflects solid understanding of the material, while the feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5 suggests high satisfaction among participants.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully met all key performance indicators, including a 100% completion rate and a 100% pass rate.
The total training hours of 216 and a scaled cost of 15 indicate efficient resource utilization.
The effectiveness score of 92.28 further underscores the program's success in delivering valuable training.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.
To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of the training program, it is recommended to continue monitoring trainee feedback and performance metrics.
Consider implementing advanced training techniques or supplementary resources to further elevate the average score and ensure sustained engagement.
Additionally, exploring opportunities for mentorship roles for high-performing trainees may foster a culture of continuous learning.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
